'''vosayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:nyctophilic|nyctophilic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-s-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nyctophilic|nyctophilic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vosayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vosayithi|vosayithi]] || [[word:vosayiji|vosayiji]] || [[word:vosayishi|vosayishi]] || [[word:vosayiki|vosayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vosayuthuthu|vosayuthuthu]] || [[word:vosayujuju|vosayujuju]] || [[word:vosayushushu|vosayushushu]] || [[word:vosayukuku|vosayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vosayuthu|vosayuthu]] || [[word:vosayuju|vosayuju]] || [[word:vosayushu|vosayushu]] || [[word:vosayuku|vosayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vosayufthuf|vosayufthuf]] || [[word:vosayufjuf|vosayufjuf]] || [[word:vosayufshuf|vosayufshuf]] || [[word:vosayufkuf|vosayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vosayethe|vosayethe]] || [[word:vosayeje|vosayeje]] || [[word:vosayeshe|vosayeshe]] || [[word:vosayeke|vosayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vosayothotho|vosayothotho]] || [[word:vosayojojo|vosayojojo]] || [[word:vosayoshosho|vosayoshosho]] || [[word:vosayokoko|vosayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vosayotho|vosayotho]] || [[word:vosayojo|vosayojo]] || [[word:vosayosho|vosayosho]] || [[word:vosayoko|vosayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vosayofthof|vosayofthof]] || [[word:vosayofjof|vosayofjof]] || [[word:vosayofshof|vosayofshof]] || [[word:vosayofkof|vosayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vosayÃŸfthÃŸf|vosayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vosayÃŸfjÃŸf|vosayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vosayÃŸfshÃŸf|vosayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vosayÃŸfkÃŸf|vosayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vosayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|vosayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vosayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|vosayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vosayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|vosayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vosayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|vosayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vosayÃŸfthÃŸf|vosayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vosayÃŸfjÃŸf|vosayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vosayÃŸfshÃŸf|vosayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vosayÃŸfkÃŸf|vosayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vosayÃŸfthÃŸf|vosayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vosayÃŸfjÃŸf|vosayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vosayÃŸfshÃŸf|vosayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vosayÃŸfkÃŸf|vosayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vosayÃḊthÃḊ|vosayÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:vosayÃḊjÃḊ|vosayÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:vosayÃḊshÃḊ|vosayÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:vosayÃḊkÃḊ|vosayÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vosayathatha|vosayathatha]] || [[word:vosayajaja|vosayajaja]] || [[word:vosayashasha|vosayashasha]] || [[word:vosayakaka|vosayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vosayatha|vosayatha]] || [[word:vosayaja|vosayaja]] || [[word:vosayasha|vosayasha]] || [[word:vosayaka|vosayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vosayafthaf|vosayafthaf]] || [[word:vosayafjaf|vosayafjaf]] || [[word:vosayafshaf|vosayafshaf]] || [[word:vosayafkaf|vosayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:vosayasha|vosayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:vosayshÃḋsha|vosayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vosayrosha|vosayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vosaymusha|vosaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:vosayasha|vosayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govosaynkshÃḋsha|govosaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govosaynkrosha|govosaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govosaynkmusha|govosaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govosaynkyasha|govosaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:vosasayasha|vosasayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vosasayshÃḋsha|vosasayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vosasayrosha|vosasayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vosasaymusha|vosasaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vosasayasha|vosasayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govosasaynkshÃḋsha|govosasaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govosasaynkrosha|govosasaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govosasaynkmusha|govosasaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govosasaynkyasha|govosasaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vesÃḊyasha|vesÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vesÃḊyshÃḋsha|vesÃḊyshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vesÃḊyrosha|vesÃḊyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vesÃḊymusha|vesÃḊymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vesÃḊyasha|vesÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govesÃḊynkshÃḋsha|govesÃḊynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govesÃḊynkrosha|govesÃḊynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govesÃḊynkmusha|govesÃḊynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govesÃḊynkyasha|govesÃḊynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:vosfayasha|vosfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vosfayshÃḋsha|vosfayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vosfayrosha|vosfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vosfaymusha|vosfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vosfayasha|vosfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govosfaynkshÃḋsha|govosfaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govosfaynkrosha|govosfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govosfaynkmusha|govosfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govosfaynkyasha|govosfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
